title: Workspace
subtitle: private/local mounts
description: Local/private workspace mount resolver for game repositories available under games/<id> without making private game state part of the public Studio repository.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Workspace module contract: public game registry, local ignored private registry, private nested repo boundary, preflight command, and validation.

children.title: games.mjs
children.description: Resolves public game mounts and explicit private local mounts, runs the private game preflight, and provides the parent Git command guard used by agent shell hooks.
children.role: game mount resolver, privacy preflight, and git guard
